Class SwingDialogService

java.lang.Object
controller.SwingDialogService
All Implemented Interfaces:
IUserDialogService
public class SwingDialogService extends Object implements IUserDialogService
Swing-based implementation of IUserDialogService.

This class uses modal Swing dialogs to interact with the user. It translates dialog results into return values expected by controllers.

    • SwingDialogService

      public SwingDialogService(JFrame owner)

      owner - the parent frame for all dialogs; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • requestWorkspaceRename

      public Workspace requestWorkspaceRename(Workspace workspace)
      Requests a new title for the given workspace.
      Specified by:
      requestWorkspaceRename in interface IUserDialogService
      Parameters:
      workspace - the workspace to rename
      Returns:
      the edited workspace if confirmed, or null if cancelled
